query: SELECT r.id, r.status, r.run_type, COUNT(s.id) as slide_count FROM content_runs r LEFT JOIN generated_slides s ON s.content_run_id = r.id WHERE r.id IN (360002, 360003, 360004) GROUP BY r.id, r.status, r.run_type;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3BMt98Y6933b8wn.a26cf65c5d5d --database gydcH5xscZ9R6SrGgu5bZS --execute SELECT r.id, r.status, r.run_type, COUNT(s.id) as slide_count FROM content_runs r LEFT JOIN generated_slides s ON s.content_run_id = r.id WHERE r.id IN (360002, 360003, 360004) GROUP BY r.id, r.status, r.run_type;
